annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under ORS 82.010(1)(a) — 9% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Oregon’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
